Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile private cache classes, representation validators, conditional reads, writes, and invalidation; browser TypeScript must remain deterministic and free of Node, network, database, and host effects; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance.
